post.message: LLM judge was requested but is unavailable (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or the upstream call errored); deterministic-only verdict stands for this run. Severity raised because the PR claims a fix ("fixes #17514").

A eslint-disable suppression was added in packages/cloudflare/src/utils/flushLock.ts. The checker was silenced rather than the underlying diagnostic resolved; if the PR claims a fix, the suppressed warning may be the defect shipping with its alarm turned off. Severity raised because the PR claims a fix ("fixes #17514").
